hooks.command: export PATH="$HOME/.nvm/versions/node/v$(ls \"$HOME/.nvm/versions/node\" 2>/dev/null | sed 's/^v//' | sort -t. -k1,1n -k2,2n -k3,3n | tail -1)/bin:$HOME/.local/bin:/usr/local/bin:/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH"; _R="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}"; [ -z "$_R" ] && _R=$(ls -dt $HOME/.claude/plugins/cache/thedotmack/claude-mem/[0-9]*/ 2>/dev/null | head -1); _R="${_R%/}"; [ -z "$_R" ] && _R="$HOME/.claude/plugins/marketplaces/thedotmack/plugin"; node "$_R/scripts/smart-install.js"

export PATH="$($SHELL -lc 'echo $PATH' 2>/dev/null):$PATH"; _R="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}"; [ -z "$_R" ] && _R=$(ls -dt $HOME/.claude/plugins/cache/thedotmack/claude-mem/[0-9]*/ 2>/dev/null | head -1); _R="${_R%/}"; [ -z "$_R" ] && _R="$HOME/.claude/plugins/marketplaces/thedotmack/plugin"; _P=$(node -e "const fs=require('fs');const os=require('os');const path=require('path');const file=path.join(os.homedir(),'.claude-mem','settings.json');try{const parsed=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(file,'utf8'));const env=parsed.env&&typeof parsed.env==='object'?parsed.env:parsed;process.stdout.write(String(env.CLAUDE_MEM_WORKER_PORT||'37777'));}catch{process.stdout.write('37777');}"); node "$_R/scripts/bun-runner.js" "$_R/scripts/worker-service.cjs" start >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; for i in 1 2 3 4 5 6 7 8; do curl -sf --max-time 2 "http://127.0.0.1:${_P}/api/health" >/dev/null 2>&1 && break; sleep 1; done; echo '{"continue":true,"suppressOutput":true}'

export PATH="$($SHELL -lc 'echo $PATH' 2>/dev/null):$PATH"; _R="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}"; [ -z "$_R" ] && _R=$(ls -dt $HOME/.claude/plugins/cache/thedotmack/claude-mem/[0-9]*/ 2>/dev/null | head -1); _R="${_R%/}"; [ -z "$_R" ] && _R="$HOME/.claude/plugins/marketplaces/thedotmack/plugin"; _P=$(node -e "const fs=require('fs');const os=require('os');const path=require('path');const file=path.join(os.homedir(),'.claude-mem','settings.json');try{const parsed=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(file,'utf8'));const env=parsed.env&&typeof parsed.env==='object'?parsed.env:parsed;process.stdout.write(String(env.CLAUDE_MEM_WORKER_PORT||'37777'));}catch{process.stdout.write('37777');}"); if curl -sf --max-time 2 "http://127.0.0.1:${_P}/api/health" >/dev/null 2>&1; then node "$_R/scripts/bun-runner.js" "$_R/scripts/worker-service.cjs" hook claude-code context || echo '{"continue":true,"suppressOutput":true}'; else echo '{"continue":true,"suppressOutput":true}'; fi

export PATH="$($SHELL -lc 'echo $PATH' 2>/dev/null):$PATH"; _R="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}"; [ -z "$_R" ] && _R=$(ls -dt $HOME/.claude/plugins/cache/thedotmack/claude-mem/[0-9]*/ 2>/dev/null | head -1); _R="${_R%/}"; [ -z "$_R" ] && _R="$HOME/.claude/plugins/marketplaces/thedotmack/plugin"; node "$_R/scripts/bun-runner.js" "$_R/scripts/worker-service.cjs" hook claude-code session-init

export PATH="$($SHELL -lc 'echo $PATH' 2>/dev/null):$PATH"; _R="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}"; [ -z "$_R" ] && _R=$(ls -dt $HOME/.claude/plugins/cache/thedotmack/claude-mem/[0-9]*/ 2>/dev/null | head -1); _R="${_R%/}"; [ -z "$_R" ] && _R="$HOME/.claude/plugins/marketplaces/thedotmack/plugin"; node "$_R/scripts/bun-runner.js" "$_R/scripts/worker-service.cjs" hook claude-code summarize
